input.message: Guardian blocked an unsafe launch setup.

evidence.label: Guardian blocked
evidence.detail: Guardian blocked an unsafe launch setup.

input.message: Guardian adjusted launch settings for safety.

evidence.label: Guardian intervened
evidence.detail: Guardian adjusted launch settings for safety.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:retry
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian classified the install download failure as retryable.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install stopped because a provider or network download was unavailable or interrupted.

outcome.label: Guardian classified the install download failure as retryable.
outcome.detail: The install stopped because a provider or network download was unavailable or interrupted.
guidance: Retry the install after checking connection and storage availability.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian paused further install retries after repeated provider failure.
guardian_outcome_detail:The same provider or network download failure repeated while the retry cooldown was active.

outcome.label: Guardian paused further install retries after repeated provider failure.
outcome.detail: The same provider or network download failure repeated while the retry cooldown was active.
guidance: Wait a few minutes, then retry after checking connection and storage availability.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Wait a few minutes, then retry after checking connection and storage availability.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked install because provider metadata could not be trusted.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install did not continue with invalid provider metadata.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked install because provider metadata could not be trusted.
outcome.detail: The install did not continue with invalid provider metadata.
guidance: Retry later or choose another version source.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Retry later or choose another version source.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked loader install because the required base install failed.
guardian_outcome_detail:The loader install did not continue after the base Minecraft install failed.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked loader install because the required base install failed.
outcome.detail: The loader install did not continue after the base Minecraft install failed.
guidance: Retry the base version install, then retry the loader install.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Retry the base version install, then retry the loader install.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:This Minecraft version needs a Java runtime that is not available for this device.
guardian_outcome_detail:Java runtime component jre-legacy is not available for linux_64.

outcome.label: This Minecraft version needs a Java runtime that is not available for this device.
outcome.detail: Java runtime component jre-legacy is not available for linux_64.
guidance: This version cannot be installed on this device.

output.retry_disabled_reason: This version cannot be installed on this device.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:This Minecraft version needs Rosetta 2 on Apple Silicon Macs.
guardian_outcome_detail:Java runtime component jre-legacy needs Rosetta 2 on this Mac.

outcome.label: This Minecraft version needs Rosetta 2 on Apple Silicon Macs.
outcome.detail: Java runtime component jre-legacy needs Rosetta 2 on this Mac.
guidance: Install Rosetta 2 by running `softwareupdate --install-rosetta --agree-to-license` in Terminal, then retry.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Install Rosetta 2 by running `softwareupdate --install-rosetta --agree-to-license` in Terminal, then retry.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked install because Axial could not write launcher-managed files safely.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install did not mutate files after the filesystem refused the operation.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked install because Axial could not write launcher-managed files safely.
outcome.detail: The install did not mutate files after the filesystem refused the operation.
guidance: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked install because temporary download state could not be written safely.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install did not continue after temporary download state could not be written safely.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked install because temporary download state could not be written safely.
outcome.detail: The install did not continue after temporary download state could not be written safely.
guidance: Check app data permissions and disk availability before retrying the install.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Check app data permissions and disk availability before retrying the install.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked install because verified download data could not be promoted safely.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install did not replace launcher-managed files after atomic promotion failed.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked install because verified download data could not be promoted safely.
outcome.detail: The install did not replace launcher-managed files after atomic promotion failed.
guidance: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Check app data permissions and retry the install.

facts: guardian_outcome_decision:block
guardian_outcome_summary:Guardian blocked install to protect user-owned or unknown files.
guardian_outcome_detail:The install did not automatically mutate a target whose ownership was unsafe.

outcome.label: Guardian blocked install to protect user-owned or unknown files.
outcome.detail: The install did not automatically mutate a target whose ownership was unsafe.
guidance: Move the affected files or choose a launcher-managed library location before retrying.

output.retry_disabled_reason: Move the affected files or choose a launcher-managed library location before retrying.
